Careerspan × CorridorX · Addepar · Feb 2026

Archit

Sr. Backend Software Engineer

5.0y exp · 3.7y IC · 1.3y Lead · 3 Careerspan screens

📋 CANDIDATE BOTTOM LINE

This zero-to-one platform builder is a conditional fit based on my screens because founding backend
products while operationalizing LLM fraud pipelines demonstrates rare architect-operator range.

🤔 Proceed with Caution — 75/100

📊 SKILLS SIGNAL
Screen-verified
58%
Resume-only
36%

🔍 What the Resume Can't Tell You
— Behavioral signals from Careerspan screens

Zero-To-One Platform Builder

"Founded the Assignment platform, building initial PoC and
scaling to full product"

— While growing and mentoring a team of 8 engineers at Embibe's
education platform serving 10M+ learners

Peak-Load Infrastructure Architect

"Drove EKS replicas, RDS sizing, cache optimizations, and
SOPs for 5× traffic spikes"

— During Quince's Black Friday/Cyber Monday scaling to support $15M
daily revenue and 100k+ orders

Ml-To-Operations Pipeline Builder

"Designed LLM-powered fraud review pipeline using RAG
to generate investigation reports"

— At Quince, creating human-in-the-loop automation that delivered
summaries to Slack for operational action

Zero-Downtime Migration Executor

"Overhauled database schemas and executed smooth
migration with zero downtime"

— Leading critical redesign of Embibe's user timeline backend to
remove scaling bottlenecks

❓ Questions That Matter
— Key areas to probe in the interview

Solution Architecture

"Tell me about a complex system you architected from
scratch. What tradeoffs did you navigate, and how has the
solution evolved as requirements changed?"

Cross-functional ML Collaboration

"Describe a project where you worked closely with ML
engineers to productionize a model. What infrastructure
challenges emerged, and how did you resolve differing
priorities between engineering and ML teams?"

Security Compliance

"Walk me through how you've implemented security
controls in a production system—things like access
management, encryption, or compliance requirements.
What frameworks or standards have you worked with?"

Python Programming

"What's the most technically demanding Python code
you've written? Tell me about a time you had to optimize
performance or debug a tricky issue in Python."
